scope: Profile APK scrolled-away desktop-origin sync smoke covering real server-wide project discovery, long native history backfill, explicit refresh, and new-message jump behavior.

mobile_app.head: dc1e44e
commits: da6b272 test: cover scrolled desktop sync refresh
dc1e44e test: clear stale new-message affordance in desktop sync smoke

source.head: 7e436f7e
source.commit: fix: order mobile native transcript pages by record time

acceptance_notes: The profile APK listed server-wide real projects and opened disposable test_ccb2_alpha/mobile_probe.
The app loaded a mixed provider-native long-history fixture, scrolled away from the newest turn, and stayed away from bottom while desktop-origin pane input was injected.
After explicit refresh, the app showed the new-message affordance and jumped to the desktop-origin marker without reopening the project.
Source-side evidence confirms the injected desktop-origin input did not use CCB ask/jobs and did not include CCB_REQ_ID or mobile_gateway pollution.
The source fix 7e436f7e orders native transcript pages by rollout record timestamp so newer pane input is not hidden before older backfill thread records.
